title: Feat implementation continuation — skill/defense/action metadata pass
source: Current repo snapshot plus phase 1-10 changed-files stack; refreshed descriptions and uploaded scrape seed used where available.

changedFeats.name: Spray Shot
changedFeats.summary: Converted manual feat into autofire attack-option metadata.

changedFeats.name: Improved Charge
changedFeats.summary: Converted manual charge movement exception into combat-option flag metadata.

changedFeats.name: Expert Droid Repair
changedFeats.summary: Converted manual mapping into Mechanics/Repair Droid multi-target metadata.

changedFeats.name: Galactic Alliance Military Training
changedFeats.summary: Converted needs-review metadata into condition-track mitigation rule metadata.

changedFeats.name: Slippery Maneuver
changedFeats.summary: Added Dodge-target and Withdraw metadata; no static Reflex bonus.

changedFeats.name: Indomitable Will
changedFeats.summary: Refined conditional Will modifier to mind-affecting context and added defense reroll metadata.

changedFeats.name: Scion of Dorin
changedFeats.summary: Refined Fortitude bonus to natural-hazard context and Species type.

changedFeats.name: Pincer
changedFeats.summary: Converted manual mapping into explicit Pin/Grapple rider metadata.

changedFeats.name: Forceful Throw
changedFeats.summary: Implemented Move Object-specific Use the Force +2 through SkillFeatResolver.

changedFeats.name: Rapport
changedFeats.summary: Converted manual mapping into Aid Another support metadata.

changedFeats.name: Resilient Strength
changedFeats.summary: Implemented as DefenseCalculator best-of STR/CON Fortitude ability rule.

changedFeats.name: Expert Briber
changedFeats.summary: Converted manual mapping into Haggle/Bribery DC-adjustment metadata.

changedFeats.name: Logic Upgrade: Tactician
changedFeats.summary: Converted manual mapping into Aid Another attack-support metadata.

changedFeats.name: Warrior Heritage
changedFeats.summary: Refined Will bonus to Atlatl/Cesta wielding context and morale type.

changedFeats.name: Lasting Influence
changedFeats.summary: Removed false Will-defense shape and added Persuasion follow-up metadata.

changedFeats.name: Droidcraft
changedFeats.summary: Converted manual mapping into Repair Droid time-override metadata.

changedFeats.name: K'thri Training
changedFeats.summary: Removed false +2 attack and added unarmed swift-attack option with base-only damage flag.

changedFeats.name: Teräs Käsi Training
changedFeats.summary: Removed false +2 attack and added unarmed hit rider for -5 effective Damage Threshold.

changedFeats.name: Instinctive Defense
changedFeats.summary: Hardened existing Force Point defense resource metadata and marked as ACTIVE/RESOURCE.

changedFeats.name: Forceful Vitality
changedFeats.summary: Implemented Endurance +2 and once/encounter failed-reroll metadata consumed by SkillFeatResolver.

engineChanges.change: Fortitude Defense now consumes defenseAbilityRules, enabling Resilient Strength to use the better of STR/CON.
Attack options can now require unarmed weapons and can mark selected attacks as base-damage-only.
Damage rolling respects the base-damage-only flag for special unarmed options such as K’thri Training.

notes: Skill bonuses/rerolls use existing SkillFeatResolver paths.
Resilient Strength is executable through DefenseCalculator.
Attack options appear through CombatOptionResolver where the UI exposes combat options.
Aid Another, condition-track mitigation, Dodge-target capacity, and skill-use time/DC metadata are prepared for future UI/service hooks but not fully automated here.
